name: Dark Stealth Elf
description: Dark Stealth Elf, also known as Dark Ninja Stealth Elf is the Dark Edition counterpart of Stealth Elf in Skylanders: Swap Force.
biography: While on a special mission, a team of Skylanders discovered a secret lair where Kaos was experimenting with a new discovery -- Petrified Darkness -- which he initially intended to use to stage a coup against Skylands. In their fight to stop Kaos, the lair exploded, releasing a cloud of pure Darkness. The Skylanders knew they couldn't let it escape, so they absorbed this energy, transforming them into dark versions of themselves. Fortunately, Spyro learned to tame that darkness within him long ago. So with his help, these Skylanders now have also learned to control it -- combining its power with their own to fight Kaos and the forces of evil.
personality: Disciplined and stealthy, Dark Stealth Elf has mastered the darkness within her to enhance her ninja skills, remaining a loyal defender of Skylands despite her transformed nature.

story.content: While on a special mission, a team of Skylanders discovered a secret lair where Kaos was experimenting with a new discovery -- Petrified Darkness -- which he initially intended to use to stage a coup against Skylands. In their fight to stop Kaos, the lair exploded, releasing a cloud of pure Darkness. The Skylanders knew they couldn't let it escape, so they absorbed this energy, transforming them into dark versions of themselves. Fortunately, Spyro learned to tame that darkness within him long ago. So with his help, these Skylanders now have also learned to control it -- combining its power with their own to fight Kaos and the forces of evil.

trivia: She is the second Dark Edition Skylander to be announced (the first being Dark Spyro).
Her Stealthier Decoy makes her eyes glow purple instead of green.
However, in her figure form and Trap Team, her eyes glow green.
Her scarecrows have gray or silver heads.

Unlike her normal S3 counterpart, Dark Stealth Elf wears her full black ninja costume except for the hood part where she needs to purchase her Wow Pow in order to get it. But in Trap Team, the hood part is now included even before the Wow Pow is bought. However, any hat she wears removes the top hooded part.
While the S3 version of Dark Stealth Elf has silver skin, Dark Super Shot Stealth Elf has black skin.
She is the second Alt Deco to have a repose (The first being Dark Spyro and the third being Legendary Jet-Vac.)
Dark Stealth Elf was first shown in a K-Zone Magazine where she was identified as Dark Ninja Stealth Elf.
She, Dark Super Shot Stealth Elf and Dark Golden Queen are the only dark edition counterparts of female Skylanders.

trailers.name: Skylanders Swap Force - Meet the Skylanders - Dark Stealth Elf (Silent but Deadly)

gameplay: Dark Stealth Elf specializes in close-quarters combat and evasion. Her primary attacks include Blade Slash and Stealth. She can upgrade her arsenal with Dragonfang Daggers and Arboreal Acrobatics. Her Wow Pow, Elf Jitsu, allows for even more devastating ninja maneuvers. In Skylanders: Swap Force, her ninja hood is unlocked via her Wow Pow, though it is included by default in later games like Skylanders: Trap Team.

basic.name: Blade Slash
basic.content: A rapid melee strike with daggers.

basic.name: Stealth
basic.content: Allows her to disappear while leaving a decoy in her place.

basic_upgrades.name: Arboreal Acrobatics
basic_upgrades.content: Enhanced movement and agility through acrobatic maneuvers.

wow_pows.name: Elf Jitsu
wow_pows.content: A mastery of combat that also unlocks her ninja hood in Skylanders: Swap Force.
